---
title: "About"
page-layout: article
---

## ForecastAI

**ForecastAI** is a technical blog sharing core concepts, recent research, and hands-on tutorials in artificial intelligence and data science.

## Topics We Cover

- **Time Series Forecasting** — LSTM, Transformer, and statistical model-based analysis and prediction
- **Causal Inference** — Data-driven causal analysis using Transfer Entropy, Granger Causality, PCMCI, and more
- **Deep Learning & Machine Learning** — Model architecture, training strategies, and hyperparameter tuning
- **Explainable AI (XAI)** — Techniques for model interpretability and trustworthiness
- **Data Analysis** — Exploratory data analysis, preprocessing, and visualization

## Our Goals

1. Explain papers and theory with **executable code**.
2. Provide **practical, actionable content** for students and practitioners in data science and AI.
3. Cover each topic in depth while keeping it **concise and to the point**.

## Contact

- GitHub: [github.com/phyzikst-web](https://github.com/phyzikst-web)
